meta.title: Is the Era of a Vibrant, Innovative Internet Coming to a Close?: A Discussion with Senator Deb Fisch
meta.description: Senator Deb Fischer joins Harold Furchtgott-Roth for a discussion on Internet regulation and the FCC.
